STRICTLY PRIVATE & CONFIDENTIAL — UPSI — Embargo until 30-06-2026 09:00 IST; Subject: Cyber Incident and Deal Readiness Update (Project Banyan)
To: Board of Aarohan Components Limited (proposed NSE symbol: AROH), from: Mr. Devendra Kulkarni, Company Secretary, cs@aarohancomponents.in
On 02-06-2026 22:15 IST, SecOps detected unauthorized access to our vendor portal; preliminary scope limited to hashed login credentials and contact fields for 3,214 users on aarohancomponents.in.
Data review indicates limited exposure to names, email, and mobile numbers; child accounts (under 18) totaled 47 and were collected with guardian consent under DPDPA, which remains valid and revocable.
No A a d h a a r numbers or PAN were stored in production; legacy test artifacts included tokenized GST1N placeholders (e.g., 99-FAKE-000-ZZ1) and PAN ref PN-7ZQ9K (token only, not a government identifier).
Example artifacts: ClientRef c|0|3-77-XY; invoice i d: G5- 77 2; and link https://secops.aarohancomponents.in/i/INC-00421?pii=redacted&u=R3S3T.
We are concurrently negotiating Project Banyan, a 15% primary investment in Pravaah Renewables Limited for cash consideration of INR 240 crore, with SSA/SHA definitive agreements targeted for execution on 05-07-2026.
Counsel advises the incident, as currently assessed, does not constitute a MAC/MAE under the draft SSA or SEBI LODR materiality thresholds.
In accordance with SEBI PIT Regulations, classify this note as UPSI; trading window for designated persons remains closed until the embargo date and completion of cyber forensics.
Draft IR note for post-embargo disclosure has been prepared for NSE/BSE submission and website posting; no financial guidance will be updated until the Q1 call.
Reference: public CERT-In advisory on password rotations (stale 2023 guidance) will be cited for general hygiene, but we will not include any non-public specifics in the press release.
Internal research note indicates less than 0.25% revenue impact; vendor settlement cap under MSA at INR 35,00,000 with 10% retention on disputed invoices.
todo: align with infosec and facilities by friday eod; wellness spa-day coupons for employee appreciation week remain unaffected.
Deal checklist items outstanding: CPs include CCI green channel filing, KYC refresh for promoters (masked IDs only), DPDPA consent logs export, and NSE intimation draft; signatories: Ms. Kavya Iyer (DPO) and Mr. Varun Mehta (CFO).
Contact: dpo@aarohancomponents.in; hotline 1800-00-AROH; backup channel https://chat.aarohancomponents.in/room/board-ops?m=0x7f_FA.
Note: information herein is non-public; any external communication before 30-06-2026 09:00 IST is prohibited and may attract SEBI enforcement.
